findings.description: Section s1 content is only 42 characters, below the 50-character threshold. The section contains a single summary sentence without substantive content.
findings.source_evidence: Source section '使用例' introduces the chapter with 'オブジェクトのフィールドの値をデータベースに登録する場合のシーケンス、実装例について解説を行う。' and a sequence diagram image.

findings.description: Hint 'PreparedStatement' is missing. The class PreparedStatement#setObject is explicitly mentioned in s2 content (step 5) but absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source No5: 'バインド変数への設定は、PreparedStatement#setObjectを使用して行う。'

findings.description: Hint 'BasicApplicationInitializer' is missing. The class nablarch.core.repository.initialization.BasicApplicationInitializer appears in both the XML config example and the initializerの設定 subsection (c) in s4.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML config: '<component name="initializer" class="nablarch.core.repository.initialization.BasicApplicationInitializer">' and section c) initializerの設定.

findings.description: Hint 'FieldAnnotationHandlerSupport' is missing. The class is named in the b-4 subsection title (used as a category label for the annotation handlers) and is present in s4 section text.
